title: Rename device - UI, device doesn't support
scenario: Device Name setting incorrectly appears in Device Settings > General for unsupported Poly devices
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that does NOT support renaming (e.g., a Voyager 5200, Voyager 4320, or any device not in the supported list).
4. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
6. Observe the list of options displayed under General.
expected: The "Device Name" option must NOT appear in Device Settings > General for devices that do not support renaming.
